pending.body: Propagate or persistently quarantine `AppError::LeaseCleanupPartialFailure` in the multi-repo daemon loop as well. The new fail-closed behavior only exists in the single-repo path (`src/contexts/automation_runtime/daemon_loop.rs:1130-1139`), but `process_task_multi_repo()` still bubbles `release_task_lease()` failures up into `process_cycle_multi_repo()`, where the generic branch at `src/contexts/automation_runtime/daemon_loop.rs:589-610` just logs and breaks the current cycle. On the next poll that repo is eligible again even though the prior task kept contradictory durable lease/worktree state, so GitHub/multi-repo daemon deployments still do not actually block on partial cleanup failures.

status_summary: running: final review restart round 6 -> Plan and Implement
